scripts.build: pnpm --filter batch-flow-scheduling build && node sync-docs.mjs generated-docs && ../staffing-scheduling-playground/node_modules/.bin/vite build && cp ../resource-scheduling-site/shared.css dist/shared.css && node sync-docs.mjs dist/generated-docs
scripts.dev: pnpm --filter batch-flow-scheduling build && node sync-docs.mjs generated-docs && ../staffing-scheduling-playground/node_modules/.bin/vite
scripts.ship: pnpm run build && XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/tmp/codex-wrangler XDG_CACHE_HOME=/tmp/codex-wrangler-cache ../staffing-scheduling-playground/node_modules/.bin/wrangler deploy
